title: Client Services Coordinator
description:
Marsh McLennan is a leader in risk, strategy, and human capital consulting, serving Fortune 500 companies globally.

We're seeking a Client Services Coordinator to join our Risk Management team in Baltimore. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Serve as primary point of contact for client inquiries and service requests
Coordinate with internal teams to ensure timely resolution of client issues
Maintain client relationships and support contract renewals
Prepare client reports and communication materials
Track client satisfaction and identify opportunities for service improvement
Manage administrative tasks related to client onboarding and offboarding

requirements.education: High school diploma or Associate's degree in Business or related field
requirements.experience_years: 1-3 years in customer service, account coordination, or administrative support
certifications: None required; certification in client service appreciated
